failures.description: The agent answered that the vacuum item does not have bagged/bagless=bagged even though the catalog result explicitly showed "bagged/bagless": "bagged".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned one item with options containing "bagged/bagless": "bagged". The Executor then produced the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts that tool result. This is not an invalid invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the needed evidence was present and was reasoned about incorrectly.
